This is not an AYCE place
16 servings? 16?
I think 3 more servings and some fried rice would make me happy
Hello everyone~
I'm here at Yaksoo today
They started their business in Cheonggyecheon 27 years ago
So I am here to try it
I heard that there's a waitlist for lunch and dinner times
I'm here at a late hour since they close pretty late
Hello
May I see the menu?
Mountain Chain Tripe, Large Intestines, Small Intestines,
3 orders of the beef small intestines,

And 3 orders of the combination
How will she eat that by herself?
They're open until 5 in the morning
So I will eat as much as I want
It's completely filled with fat
Thank you
Oh, like this
I'll show you guys
I was told to try the tripe too
Large intestines Let's try all of them first
It's very textbook-like
Beef small intestines are the truth
Heart! I'll have to eat this first
This is too funny
Whole intestine
That looks good

It feels like it's getting more tender as time goes by
Am I just confused?
Hot!
I just burned my mouth
3 mushrooms
Fried rice? Of course I'll have some
I want to eat lots of intestines instead
Do I need to order it right now?
Excuse me,
It takes time to come out, right?
I'll order more right now
3 orders of abomasum, 1 mountain chain tripe
2 orders of beef small intestiness
Can you eat it all? Yes
12 servings
2 grills cleared

That's why she's famous
She's incredible
Here comes the intestine train
4 pieces
That's so savory
When the intestines come to Majang-dong (neighborhood in Seoul)
You need to hand-pick the good quality ones
You know the boards at the market
We sleep there and wake up when cars honk
I can't get that kind of meat if I don't
She's so good at eating, I want to go next to her and steal her food
I did business for 27 years
I've never seen anyone eat this much
These are all ready to eat?
Yes, it's ready
I can start eating it? Yes

Thank you
This one is very long
We came here to eat this because her videos made me crave it
I was surprised to see her here
That's so cool
Need to eat the tripe first
It won't be as good if I eat it later
The mountain chain tripe looks strange, right?
To describe its texture, It's just very chewy
And it's crunchy as well
Let's eat the large intestines now
It's cooked really well It's so tasty
Wait, not the large intestines It's the abomasum
Why am I like this
I really like the abomasum
The sound

Tripe skewer
There was 1 piece of abomasum
This is for the thumbnail
Thumbnail
They saw me
[Witness #1]
I'm going to eat it like that too
Don't cut it please I'm going to eat it like that

[3456 Witnesses]

Of course, I'm still hungry

I'll think for a bit
Excuse me,
Do you need more?

2 orders of abomasum, 1 order of small intestines

16!?
SIXTEEN?
16!

Right,
Let's take out all the heart first
Don't get burnt!

Another one
Anotha 1
Heart mountain

I have a big mouth, but not the inside of my mouth

She's so amazing
Oh no, it fell You're mine
So nutty

I think 3 more servings and some fried rice would make me happy
But it's getting late

Very nutty

No, it's okay

So young..

And I can get full
